description_long: This is a medium-sized kitchen knife with a straight-edged, single-sided blade made of metallic material, likely stainless steel. The blade is broad and tapers to a slightly rounded tip, suitable for slicing and chopping. The handle is ergonomically contoured, made of black plastic or composite material, and features two visible yellow rivets securing it to the tang. The handle has a subtle finger groove design for improved grip and comfort during use. The overall construction appears robust and practical, with no visible decorative elements or guard between the blade and handle. The knife is utilitarian in appearance, designed for everyday kitchen tasks.
description: A medium-sized kitchen knife with a straight, broad metallic blade and a contoured black handle secured by yellow rivets. The design is practical and ergonomic, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight metallic blade and the contoured black handle with yellow rivets.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the ergonomic curvature of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the blade and handle profile with visible rivets.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the handle's shape and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
attribute_handle_design: contoured black plastic handle with finger grooves and yellow rivets
